folderId.description: Parent folder ID to list contents of. Omit to list files across all of Drive (not scoped to a folder). Use search_files with query="'root' in parents" to list only root-level files.

pageSize.description: Maximum results per page. Defaults to 50. Use pageToken from the response for the next page.

pageToken.description: Page token from a previous list_files response to retrieve the next page of results.

orderBy.description: Sort order. Examples: 'modifiedTime desc', 'name', 'createdTime desc'. Default is unspecified.

fields.description: Override the fields returned in each file. Defaults to 'nextPageToken,files(id,name,mimeType,modifiedTime,size,parents)'.
